summary: Designed 8-pass pipeline (Pass 0-7) for fantasy-writer: knowledge-curation → discovery → analysis → planning → execution → verification → gapHunting → delivery. 4 re-entry rules (RE-001 through RE-004) covering analysis-level, planning-level, execution-level, and verification-triggered re-entry. Convergence limit: 10 cycles (2-4 expected). Estimated 28 factory agents across all passes. All 7 user-requested passes included plus Pass 0.
